caption:
Neon rain slicks the synth-leather jacket as I push the hood of the hover-bike. 🚗🔻

The streets of Neo-Veridia glow violet and pink under the acid summer sky. I adjust the straps of my holographic bikini—glitch patterns dancing across the neon mesh—and grin. They call this heatwave a "System Overload," but to me, it's an invite to dive deeper into the night market.

My legs, toned from endless repairs, find the frame. A rival courier challenges me near a floating noodle bar, sparks flying as our drones clash. We zip over rooftops, wind whipping the holo-bikini straps, the scent of ozone and jasmine overwhelming. For a split second, his arm brushes my back, sending a jolt through my circuitry. He growls in low-pitch synth, hungry for more than just the data crate I carry.

I smirk—why resist a glitch that amplifies the thrill? We race for the terminal. I slide the heavy metal box into the drone's palm port. He grabs at the strap, fingers trembling, breath hot on my neck as the drone zips through a rain of pixelated water balloons from the bar overhead. The air vibrates with heat, tension, and the hum of a thousand active implants waiting to be triggered. When we hit the hover-speed, he holds tight around my waist, a tangle of skin and wire in the synthetic dawn. "Drop the drive," he whispers, voice rough as static. I bite his ear, pulse syncing to the city pulse, and surge upward before the morning security bots can blink. The night is electric, and we are burning the circuit down. ❤🔥🚀

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonAdventures #HoloGlamourette #SynthGirlLife #CyberRomance
